characters.appearance: Asian male, mid-30s, medium build, light complexion. He has short, graying hair and a slight mustache and goatee.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I would love to have dinner with my friends. [I would love to have dinner with my friends.]
Character A says: मुझे लगता था मेरी English काफी अच्छी है। [I thought my English was quite good.]
Character A says: But then I tried Supernova's AI tutor, और मुझे realize हुआ कि मुझे काफी improve करना है। [But then I tried Supernova's AI tutor, and I realized I had a lot to improve on.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable misconception about their English proficiency.
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor as a practical reality check.
- Sets up the core problem: the need for targeted speaking improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: We-deo. [We-deo.]
Unknown speaker says: Video. 'V' sound पर ध्यान दें। [Video. Pay attention to the 'V' sound.]
Character A says: We-deo. [We-deo.]
Unknown speaker says: Vvv. [Vvv.]
Character A says: Vvv. [Vvv.]
Character A says: Video. [Video.]
Unknown speaker says: बहुत बढ़िया! Let's move on. [Very good! Let's move on.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product feature: interactive pronunciation practice.
- Shows real-time, actionable feedback from the AI tutor in a familiar code-mixed style.
- Provides a micro-payoff of instant correction and warm encouragement.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova ने मुझे बताया कि मुझे कहाँ practice करनी है, and I only spent 10 minutes before bed doing it. [Supernova showed me where I needed to practice, and I only spent 10 minutes before bed doing it.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova try करें and see the difference in your confidence. [Try Supernova today and see the difference in your confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the convenience and low time commitment (10 mins/day) for busy working adults.
- Delivers a strong, encouraging Call to Action.
- Replaces the competitor's 'free' claim with a focus on building real-world confidence.
